## Compliance Checklist

- [ ] Naming conventions followed (for example `NN-kebab-case` for topic files)
- [ ] No copyrighted/proprietary material copied
- [ ] Pedagogical changes are clear and reviewable
- [ ] Cross-references/prerequisites updated where needed
- [ ] Related docs updated (`README.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `docs/*`) if structure/rules changed
